32.reason: Error: Expansion includes the right character (should be p < difference). Also, no check that the difference is positive; if left >= right, loop condition is false but the dash should not be expanded at all.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Expansion includes the right character (should be p < difference). Also, no check that the difference is positive; if left >= right, loop condition is false but the dash should not be expanded at all.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  The expansion loop includes the right endpoint character, which can lead to duplication. Additionally, there is no else clause to print the '-' character when the expansion condition fails, violating the requirement to output the original string unchanged for invalid cases.
